meta.title: Milky Way Browse Cinematic
meta.description: A guided, blended sequence from immersive local sky to abstract galaxy model.

stages.label: 01 Local Sky
stages.title: Begin with the sky as experience
stages.description: The Milky Way starts as a bright, dusty band overhead. This is not yet a map. It is the sensation that needs explaining.
stages.story: Dense light in the sky, no global context yet.

stages.label: 02 Orion Spur
stages.title: Then show where we sit in the disk
stages.description: The Orion Spur fades in before the whole galaxy does. That preserves the feeling of being embedded rather than instantly jumping to a god view.
stages.story: The Sun is one marker inside a minor arm segment.

stages.label: 03 Whole Galaxy
stages.title: End with an explicit abstraction
stages.description: The final view is a model, not a literal photo. Spiral arms, bulge, and our offset position become readable without pretending the scale is natural.

landmarks.name: Galactic Center
landmarks.body: Dense central bulge and the direction of Sagittarius A*.

landmarks.name: Sun
landmarks.body: Our position within the Orion Spur, far from the core.

landmarks.name: Orion Spur
landmarks.body: A minor arm segment used as the bridge between personal sky and galaxy map.
